conservative.name: Vigil of Nature
conservative.requirements:
8 favour.
Can only invoke in a tamed natural environment such as an orchard, farm, or park. You must personally mark the site, such as with your own blood or a unique sigil crafted by you

success.description: You mark the site and protect it with the vigil of nature. No matter where you are or what your current state is, you will instantly be aware the next time a tainted or unnatural presence enters the area. Tainted or unnatural creatures include mutants (including beastmen), daemons, the undead, or those bearing a Mark of Chaos. As soon as a tainted creature entered the protected site, the vigil ends. You can only stand vigil over as many sites as your current character rank

boon.description: You gain some approximate knowledge as to nature and numbers of intruders

bane.description: You suffer 2 stress when your alarm triggers

reckless.name: Vigil of Nature
reckless.requirements:
8 favour.
Can only invoke in a wild natural environment such as a forest grove or hilltop. You must personally mark the site, such as with your own blood or a unique sigil crafted by you

success.description: You mark the site and protect it with the vigil of nature. No matter where you are or what your current state is, you will instantly be aware the next time a tainted or unnatural presence enters the area. Tainted or unnatural creatures include mutants (including beastmen), daemons, the undead, or those bearing a Mark of Chaos. As soon as a tainted creature entered the protected site, the vigil ends. You can only stand vigil over as many sites as your current character rank

boon.description: The intruders suffer 1 stress and 1 fatigue from Taal's fury

bane.description: You suffer 2 stress when your alarm triggers
